svg.title: OpenFOAM solver taxonomy by physical regime
svg.desc: A structural diagram grouping OpenFOAM solvers into eight physical categories arranged vertically with colour-coded regions
svg.text: OpenFOAM — solver taxonomy by physical regime

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the SIMPLE algorithm used by simpleFoam')
sendPrompt('Explain the PIMPLE algorithm used by pimpleFoam')
sendPrompt('What is potentialFoam used for in OpenFOAM?')
sendPrompt('When should I use icoFoam in OpenFOAM?')
sendPrompt('When should I use rhoPimpleFoam vs rhoSimpleFoam?')
sendPrompt('Explain sonicFoam in OpenFOAM and its use cases')
sendPrompt('How does rhoCentralFoam handle high-speed compressible flows?')
sendPrompt('Explain chtMultiRegionFoam conjugate heat transfer')
sendPrompt('How does the VoF method work in interFoam?')
sendPrompt('What is the isoAdvector method in interIsoFoam?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Euler-Euler two-fluid model in twoPhaseEulerFoam')
sendPrompt('What is driftFluxFoam and when should I use it?')
sendPrompt('Explain buoyantPimpleFoam and the Boussinesq approximation')
sendPrompt('What radiation models are available in buoyantSimpleFoam?')
sendPrompt('How does chtMultiRegionFoam handle solid-fluid coupling?')
sendPrompt('How does reactingFoam handle chemical kinetics?')
sendPrompt('What is fireFoam used for and what models does it include?')
sendPrompt('How does engineFoam handle piston and valve motion?')
sendPrompt('What is PDRFoam and what is it used for?')
sendPrompt('How does sprayFoam model fuel injection and atomization?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Euler-Lagrange DPM in reactingParcelFoam')
sendPrompt('When should I use coalChemistryFoam in OpenFOAM?')
sendPrompt('Explain mhdFoam and its governing equations')
sendPrompt('What solid mechanics can solidDisplacementFoam solve?')
sendPrompt('How do I run DNS in OpenFOAM with channelFoam?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenFOAM turbulence modelling work with pimpleFoam for LES?')

svg.text: Click any solver to ask a follow-up question
